name: GLOBAL TECHNOLOGIES LTD
business: Global Technologies, Ltd operates through its wholly owned subsidiaries: Primecare Supply, LLC, a B2B procurement company connecting 503B pharmaceutical manufacturers with licensed medical clinics via the Sinq Ops software platform; and GTLL Advisory Group, LLC, a strategic consulting and advisory platform for medical spas and wellness clinics.

exposures.sentence: Primecare Supply operates as a business-to-business (B2B) procurement company powered by the proprietary Sinq Ops software platform.
GTLL Advisory, operating under the trade name GloWell Advisors, was established to serve as the Company's strategic consulting and advisory platform.

catalysts.event: GTLL Advisory expects to commence revenue-generating operations
catalysts.sentence: Management expects GTLL Advisory to commence revenue-generating operations in fiscal year 2026 as part of Global's expanding health-technology and advisory services portfolio.
